title: SQL Server AG Replica Lag
description: Diagnose Availability Group secondary lag — distinguishes network bottleneck (send queue) from disk bottleneck (redo queue) and quantifies RPO exposure
author: J. Smith

ag_health_overview.description: AG health overview — sync state, send queue, redo queue per replica

interactive_hints.ag_redo_queue_detail: Run when redo queue is growing — diagnoses whether the secondary disk is falling behind applying log records
interactive_hints.ag_network_throughput: Run when send queue is growing — measures log send rate vs generation rate to identify network saturation
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

ag_redo_queue_detail.description: Secondary redo queue analysis — log apply rate vs generation rate

interactive_hints.ag_rpo_calculation: Run to calculate the exact RPO exposure in seconds and identify which databases are most at risk
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if redo queue detail is sufficient for your assessment

ag_network_throughput.description: Log send rate vs log generation rate — network throughput analysis

interactive_hints.ag_rpo_calculation: Run to translate the current lag into a business-impact RPO number
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if network analysis is sufficient

ag_rpo_calculation.description: RPO exposure calculation — data-at-risk window per database

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with RPO impact and remediation
